== Notes for [[Item:Q89738|Q89738]] ==

ID: I84736

Name: Lucius Cornelius Cassonius Scipio

Given Name: Lucius Cornelius Cassonius

Surname: Scipio

Sex: M

_UID: 6088C3E73CC32B459366C25C61FDBDDD1035

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 170

Death: deceased

Father: Lucius Eggius Cornelius Marullus b: ABT 145

Mother: Cornelia Negrina b: ABT 150

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Cornelia Marcellina b: ABT 205

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84736

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
